name: Quick Installment Loans
description_short: Time Financing Service offers personal loans of $1,000–$10,000 in Raleigh, NC with same-day approval for applicants with imperfect credit who meet basic eligibility requirements.
description_long:
Time Financing Service is a brick-and-mortar personal loan lender operating a physical location in Raleigh, North Carolina at 1487 Garner Station Boulevard. The company has been positioned as an alternative to traditional banks, particularly for applicants who have been denied by conventional lenders due to credit history issues. Their Raleigh branch operates Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM–5:30 PM, and serves customers within a 50-mile radius of their location.

The company offers unsecured personal loans ranging from $1,000 to $10,000, marketed as available for same-day funding. Borrowers can use funds for any purpose—car repairs, home repairs, vacation expenses, or bill consolidation. Time Financing advertises a Fair Lending policy and explicitly states they work with applicants who have bad credit or have been turned away by banks. They require applicants to be at least 18 years old, provide a valid North Carolina or Virginia photo ID, demonstrate income verification, maintain two open lines of credit, and live within their service area. The company will not lend to individuals currently in bankruptcy.

What distinguishes Time Financing is their stated willingness to consider applicants with less-than-perfect credit and their physical branch presence, which allows for in-person application and consultation. They emphasize individualized evaluation of loan applications rather than relying solely on credit scores. The company maintains compliance with Fair Lending standards and references the Equal Credit Opportunity Act prominently on their website.

A key caveat is that the website provides no APR, rate, or fee information—only directing customers to call or visit in person for pricing details. This opacity on cost is common in the installment loan industry but makes it impossible to assess affordability before inquiry. The $10,000 maximum loan amount is modest compared to broader personal loan markets, and the requirement for two open lines of credit may exclude applicants with severely damaged credit profiles.
pros: Same-day loan approval advertised for qualified applicants
Explicitly works with applicants who have bad credit or have been denied by banks
Loan amounts from $1,000–$10,000 available for flexible purposes (consolidation, repairs, emergencies)
Physical branch location in Raleigh allows in-person consultation and application
Fair Lending policy and ECOA compliance documented on website
Business hours Monday–Friday, 9 AM–5:30 PM for accessibility
cons: No APR, interest rates, or fee information disclosed on website—pricing opacity requires phone call or in-person visit
Two open lines of credit requirement may exclude applicants with severe credit damage or thin credit files
Maximum loan amount of $10,000 is relatively low for major expenses or debt consolidation
Service area limited to 50-mile radius of Raleigh location; borrowers must be local or nearby
Applicants currently in bankruptcy are ineligible, excluding those in active debt relief
best_for: Local Raleigh, NC residents with imperfect credit seeking $1,000–$10,000 for urgent expenses or bill consolidation
Applicants denied by traditional banks but with stable income and at least two open credit accounts
Borrowers who prefer in-person consultation and same-day funding for immediate cash needs
diagnosis: Time Financing Service is best for Raleigh-area residents with imperfect credit who need $1,000–$10,000 in same-day cash and can visit the physical branch. The primary caveat is complete absence of APR and fee disclosure—borrowers must call (919-825-4591 or 877-788-0559) or visit in person to learn actual loan costs before committing.
services: Bad credit personal loans (applicants with lower credit scores considered)
In-person loan application and consultation at Raleigh branch
Online bill payment portal (Pay Bill feature)
